title: CandleRuntime State-Vector handle abstraction (SSM/RWKV parity for KV cache surface)
goal: Define StateVectorHandle + StateVectorOps as the SSM/RWKV equivalent of KvCacheHandle: capture/restore/evict per-model SSM or RWKV state vectors. Returned from kv_cache() for SSM variants as the prefix-reuse-equivalent surface (per refinement INF-9 feature_parity_detail: 'prefix-reuse-equivalent for SSMs').
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/state_vector.rs with StateVectorHandle, StateVectorOps, SSMStateSnapshot serde impls; adapter.rs kv_cache() variant routing.
unblock_conditions: MT-063 KvCacheOps trait + MT-085/086/087 SSM/RWKV base merged.
implementation_notes: Per refinement INF-9 feature_parity_detail: SSMs need prefix-reuse-equivalent. The KvCacheOps trait surface in MT-063 is intentionally generic so SSMs can implement it with SSM-state semantics: prefix_commit captures the current SSM/RWKV state into a serialisable buffer + content_hash of the prefix tokens; prefix_restore writes the buffer back into the model's mutable state; prefix_evict + evict_all manage the in-memory LRU. SSMStateSnapshot enum: `Mamba2 { conv_states: Vec<Tensor>, ssm_states: Vec<Tensor> }`, `RwkvV5 { token_shift: Vec<Tensor>, ssm: Vec<Tensor> }`, `RwkvV6 { ... }`, `RwkvV7 { ... }` — serde Serialize as raw bytes (Tensor to_vec + dtype + shape) so snapshots persist to disk via cross-session state restore (MT-117). On restore: validate snapshot variant matches model variant; restore tensors; cross-session restore additionally validates ModelId artifact_sha256 matches the snapshot's recorded sha256 (rejects restoring into a different model). For Transformer variant: kv_cache() returns the candle-native KV-cache wrapper (MT-093 implements actual transformer KV ops); SSM/RWKV variants return StateVectorHandle. KvCacheStats for SSMs reports state_vector_bytes + entries (not token KV pairs). Tests: commit state on Mamba2, generate, restore, generate same continuation -> deterministic; tamper hash -> Err; restore across mismatched variants -> Err. UUID v7 for StateVectorId per HBR-INT-008.
risk_if_missed: SSM prefix-reuse-equivalent missing; INF-9 feature parity incomplete; cross-session state restore (MT-117) has no primitive to build on.
validator_focus: Variant-mismatch restore returns explicit Err; tamper detection; deterministic continuation after commit/restore on Mamba2.

minimum_controls: Variant-mismatch restore rejected with explicit Err.
Cross-session state restore artifact_sha256 binding enforced.
